title: Create thumbnails.py with dependency checking
description: Create pypptx/ops/thumbnails.py with a check_dependencies() function that verifies soffice, pdftoppm, and Pillow are available on the system. Prints a clear, actionable install hint to stderr and raises SystemExit on any missing dependency.
acceptance_criteria: check_dependencies() prints an install hint to stderr and exits non-zero when soffice is absent from PATH
check_dependencies() prints an install hint to stderr and exits non-zero when pdftoppm is absent from PATH
check_dependencies() prints `pip install 'pypptx[thumbnails]'` to stderr and exits non-zero when Pillow is not importable
